description: Containerize the legacy Python Flask bookstore application located in '~/projects/bookstore-legacy/'. Orchestrate the Flask API, a PostgreSQL 15 database, and an Nginx reverse proxy using Docker and Docker Compose. Ensure the database is initialized with the schema and seed data found in 'db/' and that the application uses the DATABASE_URL environment variable for its connection string. The final deployment must serve the book list at http://localhost/api/books.
